mapper.insert:
insert into t_airway_reservation
airway_reservation_id,
start_at,
end_at,
reserved_at,
airway_section_ids,
operator_id,
evaluation_results, third_party_evaluation_results, railway_operation_evaluation_results,
#{airwayReservationId,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reservedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{airwaySectionIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.drone_highway.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
#{operatorId,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{evaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
#{thirdPartyEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
#{railwayOperationEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BOOLEAN},
True,
on conflict (airway_reservation_id) do update set
airway_reservation_id = EXCLUDED.airway_reservation_id,
start_at = EXCLUDED.start_at,
end_at = EXCLUDED.end_at,
reserved_at = EXCLUDED.reserved_at,
airway_section_ids = EXCLUDED.airway_section_ids,
operator_id = EXCLUDED.operator_id,
evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.evaluation_results, third_party_evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.third_party_evaluation_results, railway_operation_evaluation_results = EXCLUDED.railway_operation_evaluation_results,
mapper.update:
update t_airway_reservation
start_at = #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_at = #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reserved_at = #{reservedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
airway_section_ids = #{airwaySectionIds,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=com.intent_exchange.drone_highway.handler.myBatis.ArrayTypeHandler},
operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluation_results = #{evaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
third_party_evaluation_results = #{thirdPartyEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
railway_operation_evaluation_results = #{railwayOperationEvaluationResults,jdbcType=BIT},
where airway_reservation_id = #{airwayReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
